---
title: "Tidy data with tidyr"
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides/tidyr.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/tidyr.html){target="_blank"} | [Download PDF slides](slides_pdf/tidyr.pdf){download="tidyr.pdf"}

::: {.callout-tip}
## Exercises
Go to the [task page](tasks/tidyr-task.qmd) for the exercises.
:::

## Resources

- [Tidyr cheatsheet](https://rstudio.github.io/cheatsheets/tidyr.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [tidyr documentation](https://tidyr.tidyverse.org/){target="_blank"}: The official documentation for tidyr, with examples and function references.
- [Pivoting vignette](https://tidyr.tidyverse.org/articles/pivot.html){target="_blank"}: A detailed guide to `pivot_longer()` and `pivot_wider()` with many practical examples.
- [Tidy data chapter in R for Data Science](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-tidy){target="_blank"}: Explains the concept of tidy data
